title: Perilepta longzhouensis
intro: Perilepta longzhouensis is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is commonly known as Longzhou herb or Longzhou mint. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Perilepta longzhouensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. Perilepta longzhouensis is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
